nodes.label: Brow Area Icon (Dark Mode)
nodes.description: A dark-mode UI icon depicting a close-up of a female face in profile/three-quarter view with eyes closed, highlighting the brow/eyebrow area. The rendering is a stylized 3D monochrome illustration with deep navy/dark blue background and subtle metallic skin tones. A small teal/mint green dot (accent marker) is placed at the inner corner of the eye near the brow, indicating the treatment target area. The eyebrow is prominently visible and well-defined. Style is premium clinical aesthetic, consistent with a body-area selector UI element.

nodes.label: Brow / Eyebrow Anatomical Region
nodes.description: Represents the brow and eyebrow region of the face as a treatment target area in an aesthetic injector directory context.
